scripts.build: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$forge = (Get-Command forge -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue).Source; if (-not $forge -and (Test-Path \"$HOME\\.foundry\\bin\\forge.exe\")) { $forge = \"$HOME\\.foundry\\bin\\forge.exe\" }; if (-not $forge) { Write-Error 'forge not found'; exit 1 }; & $forge build"
scripts.test: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$forge = (Get-Command forge -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue).Source; if (-not $forge -and (Test-Path \"$HOME\\.foundry\\bin\\forge.exe\")) { $forge = \"$HOME\\.foundry\\bin\\forge.exe\" }; if (-not $forge) { Write-Error 'forge not found'; exit 1 }; & $forge test -vv"
scripts.fmt: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$forge = (Get-Command forge -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue).Source; if (-not $forge -and (Test-Path \"$HOME\\.foundry\\bin\\forge.exe\")) { $forge = \"$HOME\\.foundry\\bin\\forge.exe\" }; if (-not $forge) { Write-Error 'forge not found'; exit 1 }; & $forge fmt"
scripts.fmt:check: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$forge = (Get-Command forge -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue).Source; if (-not $forge -and (Test-Path \"$HOME\\.foundry\\bin\\forge.exe\")) { $forge = \"$HOME\\.foundry\\bin\\forge.exe\" }; if (-not $forge) { Write-Error 'forge not found'; exit 1 }; & $forge fmt --check"
